message:
fix: ensure SSH disconnect on timeout to prevent leaked remote processes

- transfer.rs: Restructure execute_remote, execute_remote_streaming, and
  cleanup_remote to always call disconnect() even when execution errors
  (including timeouts). Previously, the `?` operator would skip disconnect,
  leaving SSH sessions and remote processes alive indefinitely.
- ssh.rs: Correct misleading comment about child drop behavior - dropping
  an openssh RemoteChild does NOT kill the remote process when a
  ControlMaster is active; the caller must explicitly disconnect.
- pipeline.rs: Remove dead code path (completed_count == 0 check was
  unreachable after completed.is_empty() early return).
- transfer.rs: Optimize partial transfer detection to lowercase stderr
  once instead of per-indicator, and log only the first matching line.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
